message:
feat(core): add agent_mail_bridge for inter-agent coordination

Wraps agent_mail CLI via SubprocessBridge for message passing,
file reservation, and agent registration. All calls fail-open.
Types: MessageId, MailMessage, ReservationResult, FileConflict,
AgentRegistration, SendResponse, ReleaseResponse.
Feature-gated behind subprocess-bridge. 41 unit tests.

Closes: ft-2zczx

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
